docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COUGHLIN MARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARDEMAN GARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COUGHLIN MARY $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $219.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $219.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $133.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $40.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT COUGHLIN MARY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY HARDEMAN GARY AS TO DEFENDANT COUGHLIN MARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-1986 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
